title: Claude Cowork setup: the only 2 files you need
summary: Claude Cowork is a workflow management system that uses two plain text files (CLAUDE.md and MEMORY.md) to organize Claude AI sessions. CLAUDE.md stores routing instructions that load different working modes, while MEMORY.md maintains project context and decisions across sessions.
